verification.reason: Checking each claim: (1) Endogenous chi transcript undetectable in peel — 'The chi transcript level was below the limit of detection in peel of all developmental stages.' ✓ (2) chs and fls present — supported by Fig. 3 description. ✓ (3) CHI as rate-limiting — 'one of the rate-limiting steps... could lie at the level of chi gene expression.' ✓ (4) Isoquercitrin accumulation suggesting rhamnosyl transferase rate-limiting — 'which might suggest that a rhamnosyl transferase has become rate limiting.' ✓ (5) Lycopene not altered — 'lycopene concentration of fruit had not been altered.' ✓ (6) No gross phenotypical differences except slight dullness — 'vegetative phenotype... was indistinguishable' and 'slight dullness in the tone of red color.' ✓ (7) Due to depletion of naringenin chalcone — 'did not accumulate significant amounts of yellow-colored naringenin chalcone which may explain our observation of a slight dullness.' ✓ (8) 1–2 copies — 'contained either one or two copies of the pBBC50 transgene.' ✓ All supported.
